title: FlowInstanceStatus
description: Lifecycle status of a FlowInstance. Aligned with §9.9.2 state machine. Terminal states: COMPLETED, FAILED, EXPIRED, CANCELLED.

IN_PROGRESS.description: Active execution; a step is running.

AWAITING_APPROVAL.description: Paused pending a manual reviewer decision.

AWAITING_WALLET.description: Paused pending a holder action (credential request or VP response).

AWAITING_EVIDENCE.description: Paused pending supplementary evidence from the applicant.

FAILED.description: A step failed with no further retries.

CANCELLED.description: Explicitly cancelled by an authorized party.
